notes.UR-17: RESOLVED — no maxLength rejection observed for any field. Server accepted all values without format/length errors.
notes.UR-21: RESOLVED — response is {status: {success, message}, data: ''} — data is empty string, NOT null, NOT array with sid/ref_id. No sid returned.

notes.key_name: list_product confirmed as the correct key name for line items.
notes.CRITICAL_FINDING: data is empty string '' — no sid, no ref_id echo. Dispatcher cannot extract sid from sendOrderInfo response. Must rely on invoices-status polling to get sid.
